name: oci-fn-log-par
description: Issue OCI Object Storage PAR (ObjectWrite) for Android log upload

scripts.local:presign:win: cross-env OCI_CONFIG_FILE=%USERPROFILE%\.oci\config OCI_PROFILE=DEFAULT OCI_REGION=ap-tokyo-1 BUCKET=my-internal-logs DEFAULT_TTL_SEC=900 node func.js --userId tester --appVersion 1.2.3 --env internal
scripts.local:presign: cross-env OCI_REGION=ap-tokyo-1 BUCKET=my-internal-logs DEFAULT_TTL_SEC=900 node func.js --userId tester --appVersion 1.2.3 --env internal
scripts.config:func: fn config function oci-fn-log-par-app oci-fn-log-par BUCKET my-internal-logs && fn config function oci-fn-log-par-app oci-fn-log-par DEFAULT_TTL_SEC 900
